debug_info.goal:
f : ℝ → ℝ
a b : ℝ
hab : a < b
n k : ℕ
hn : n ≠ 0
hk : k ≠ 0
ε δ : ℝ
hε : ε > 0
hδ : δ > 0
hunif : ∀ x ∈ Set.Icc a b, ∀ y ∈ Set.Icc a b, |y - x| < δ → |f y - f x| < ε
hfine : 2 * (b - a) / ↑n < δ
⊢ (b - a) / ↑(n * k) * ∑ j ∈ Finset.range n, ∑ k_1 ∈ Finset.range k, f (a + (↑(j + k_1 * n) + 1) * (b - a) / ↑(n * k)) -
      (b - a) / ↑n * ∑ i ∈ Finset.range n, f (a + (↑i + 1) * (b - a) / ↑n) =
    (b - a) / ↑n *
      ∑ j ∈ Finset.range n,
        (1 / ↑k * ∑ ℓ ∈ Finset.range k, f (a + (↑ℓ + ↑j * ↑k + 1) * (b - a) / (↑n * ↑k)) -
          f (a + (↑j + 1) * (b - a) / ↑n))
